title: Echo's Chocolate
description: This Mod is focused on chocolate that has plain chocolate, sea salt chocolate and chocolate with fudge, in dark and milk chocolate.
body:
Imagine stepping into your Minecraft world and finding it filled with delicious treats. Echo's Chocolate mod adds a variety of chocolates, making your gameplay more fun and interesting. With this mod, every exploration and crafting session becomes a journey to discover new flavors and create tasty delights. From gathering cocoa beans in the jungle to trading with village chocolatiers, Echo's Chocolate adds a fun twist to the game that you won't want to miss.

Echo's Chocolate brings three types of chocolate: plain chocolate, sea salt chocolate, and fudge chocolate. Each type offers something special. Plain chocolate is great for a quick snack or as an ingredient in other recipes. Sea salt chocolate mixes sweet and salty flavors, while fudge chocolate is rich and creamy. These chocolates aren't just for eating; they’re part of a larger crafting system that lets you get creative and try new things.
